name: Sweet-Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds bulk sausage, rolled into 1 1/2 inches balls
40 ounces canned pineapple chunks, drained, reserving 1 cup liquid
1/3 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
2 medium green peppers, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the meatballs and drain.
2. Meanwhile, combine the reserved pineapple liquid, ReaLemon juice, sugar, soy sauce, and ginger in a small bowl.
3. In another small bowl, stir 2 tablespoons of the lemon mixture with cornstarch; set aside.
4. Add the remaining lemon mixture to the skillet with the meatballs; cover and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Add pineapple pieces and green peppers; heat through.
6. Gradually stir in the cornstarch mixture; boil and stir for an additional minute.
7. Turn the meatballs into a serving dish and place over a warmer.
8. Serve with toothpicks. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes about 8 dozen appetizers.
